questions.question: Explain the key difference between Operational and Decision-Support Systems, providing an example of each type. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Clearly define Operational and Decision-Support Systems, and provide examples of each type in a business context.

questions.question: An organization uses an Operational Management Information System (OMIS) to manage its daily sales. Suddenly, the company's CEO wants to analyze historical sales data to identify trends and make informed strategic decisions. Which type of system should the company use to support this new requirement? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain why OMIS is not suitable for strategic decision-making and recommend a Decision-Support System (DSS) solution.

questions.question: Compare the role of data visualization in Operational and Decision-Support Systems. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the differences in data visualization needs and techniques between Operational and Decision-Support Systems.
